scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix apps/spendr install && npm --prefix apps/skies install && npm --prefix apps/pixel-runner install && npm --prefix apps/world-forge install
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "portfolio,spendr,skies,pixel-runner,world-forge" -c "cyan,green,blue,red,yellow" "vite" "cross-env PORT=3001 npm --prefix apps/spendr start" "cross-env PORT=3002 npm --prefix apps/skies start" "cross-env PORT=3003 npm --prefix apps/pixel-runner start" "cross-env PORT=3004 npm --prefix apps/world-forge start"
scripts.build:apps: npm --prefix apps/spendr run build && npm --prefix apps/skies run build && npm --prefix apps/pixel-runner run build && npm --prefix apps/world-forge run build
